scenarios.prompt: Create an executive-summary slide for a CFO showing that a $150M digital manufacturing investment yields $380M NPV over three years.
must_validate: recommendation lives in the title placeholder

scenarios.prompt: Build a slide proving that client satisfaction improved 10 points after launch using a bar chart with the standout month highlighted.
Create a decision-ask slide asking the board to approve the Transformation Office model with supporting proof on the right.
Create a three-phase rollout roadmap with dates, milestones, and a bottom summary callout.
must_validate: bottom callout stays above source zone

scenarios.prompt: Create a capability maturity matrix using Harvey balls for five domains across four criteria.
Create an image-led transformation slide where the image materially supports the thesis and the slide is title + image only.
must_validate: no manual body text is added to the green title panel
placeholder image path rather than arbitrary placement

scenarios.prompt: Ingest a client .ee4p file, build against the derived template, and persist the template for reuse in the workspace.
Render a flywheel slide for a client template that should prefer the concentric-rings treatment and KPI slides that should use the big-number dashboard treatment.
Review an already-generated deck, run QA, render and visually inspect every slide, fix blocking issues, and present the report.
must_validate: first visual pass uses rendered slide PNGs (view in Chat, Read in Code)
QA report and visually reviewed deck shown to the user
